resources.title: CSE Segment Overview
resources.summary: Defines the pooled, on-demand Success Tier model and lifecycle responsibilities for CSEs.
resources.tooltip: CSE delivery is pooled and 1:many; use programs before custom one-off work.

resources.title: CSE Operating Rhythm
resources.summary: Operational cadence for onboarding, enablement, and renewal support in pooled coverage.
resources.tooltip: Route technical depth asks through pooled queues and programs.

resources.title: Customer Health Scoring
resources.summary: Health scoring intent across product adoption, risk, outcomes, voice, and engagement signals.
resources.tooltip: Health should combine adoption and engagement, not one metric in isolation.

resources.title: Customer Health Assessment and Management
resources.summary: Yellow/red triage guidance for account risk management and escalation.
resources.tooltip: Use triage criteria to prioritize pooled queue capacity.

resources.title: Platform Value Score
resources.summary: Platform adoption rollup concept across key DevSecOps use cases.
resources.tooltip: 3+ use cases green is a strong platform adoption signal.

resources.title: Use Case Maturity Scoring
resources.summary: Adoption scoring thresholds and maturity interpretation for key use cases.
resources.tooltip: Score by behavior depth, not feature clicks alone.

resources.title: CI / Verify Playbook
resources.summary: Playbook for CI adoption acceleration and reliability improvements.
resources.tooltip: Best used with webinar + office hour follow-up sequence.

resources.title: Secure Workshop
resources.summary: Enablement pattern for secure scan baseline rollout.
resources.tooltip: Anchor secure outcomes to measurable scan coverage targets.

resources.title: Success Plans
resources.summary: Framework for measurable objectives and objective evidence updates.
resources.tooltip: Objective evidence should map to value metrics and renewal outcomes.

resources.title: Executive Business Reviews
resources.summary: Guidance for EBR narrative and executive value alignment.
resources.tooltip: Use EBRs to connect adoption change to business outcome change.

resources.title: Cadence Calls
resources.summary: Cadence call structure and operating expectations.
resources.tooltip: Cadence drift is an early signal in pooled risk triage.
